name: KailuaTown Farmers Market
tagline: Sunday morning market with live music, local coffee, and a relaxed Kailua vibe — the Windward side's best weekend ritual.
parking: Free parking near Adventist Health Castle Hospital area. Come early for closest spots
bestTime: Arrive at 8am for best selection of fresh produce and baked goods before they sell out
talkStory: Run by FarmLovers Markets at 640 Ulukahiki St, this Sunday morning market has become the Windward side's weekend social ritual. Live local musicians set the mood while you browse. The open-air cafe area with locally grown coffee is where Kailua regulars catch up -- some have been coming every Sunday since the market launched. Dog-friendly and family-friendly, it pairs perfectly with a morning at Kailua Beach or brunch at Moke's.
